meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use an Antigravity project template and overcome the no-portfolio trap. A beginner-level tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is solved by shipping functional, production-ready AI tools quickly. By leveraging the Antigravity project template and Claude Code, you bypass boilerplate fatigue, letting you focus on core logic. This workflow transforms abstract coding concepts into a high-impact portfolio piece in under two hours.
content.intro:
The screen stares back, a blinking cursor in an empty IDE. You have the theoretical knowledge, but your GitHub profile is a graveyard of abandoned tutorials. The industry doesn't care about your GPA; they care about what you can ship. The weight of 'no portfolio' is a barrier that feels impassable until you change your tooling.

We are going to dismantle that barrier today. By utilizing the Antigravity project template, we strip away the friction of scaffolding and environment configuration. Combined with the raw power of Claude Code, you are no longer just a student writing code—you are an architect building scalable AI solutions that demand attention.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Start by generating the foundation. This ensures your project follows industry-standard structure, making your code readable for future recruiters.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new production-ready web application template with authentication, database integration, and clean architecture patterns.

steps.title: Define Your Core AI Logic
steps.description: Focus on the 'Value Add'. We define the specific AI function that makes your app unique, separating it from the boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for an AI-powered data summarizer that connects to an LLM API with structured error handling.

steps.title: Implement Type-Safe API Routes
steps.description: Ensure your frontend and backend communicate reliably. Type safety is a hallmark of senior-level development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust API endpoint that validates request payloads using Zod and returns a typed response.
steps.claude_code_command: claude generate route/summarize --method POST --schema z.object({text: z.string()})

steps.title: Build the UI Component Library
steps.description: A portfolio project must look professional. We use the template's UI hooks to create a clean, modern interface.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive React component for the summarizer dashboard using Tailwind CSS and the existing theme provider.

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: A project in your local folder is invisible. We push to a live environment to prove functionality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the deployment pipeline for a production build, ensuring all environment variables are properly masked.

pro_tips: Always document your 'Why' in the README, not just the 'How'—recruiters look for decision-making logic.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your core AI logic; it proves you prioritize reliability over speed.
Keep your commit history clean by using atomic commits that represent specific features or bug fixes.
Add a 'Limitations' section to your project documentation; it shows intellectual honesty and advanced engineering maturity.
Optimize your images and assets immediately; performance metrics are the first thing technical leads notice in a demo.
content.next_steps: Refine your README with a GIF of the working app, link it prominently on your LinkedIn, and start a second project that integrates an external API.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect moment to start your career. Every day you spend without a live project is a day of lost experience. The tools are ready, the path is clear, and your portfolio is waiting to be built. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
